text:
Once upon a time, there was a shy golden retriever named Garfield.

Garfield loved to go on long walks

And listen to the wind

He loved those

Golden

Retriever dreams.

One night

A big

Owlish

Owl sat

On Garfield's tree.

Owl just thought

Ow Ow Ow.

One day?

Owl would get those

Goo-goo eyes.

Oh!

Owl thought.

You?

They love you.

You?

You love them.

Owl ow owl.

A great

Owl owl.

A lifetime?

A wee owl?

A wee owl?

A wee owl owl.

Owl got those eyes.

They got those smiles.

That?

A wee love.

And?

A wee bat.

The end.

That was owl.

That was you.

That was all their.

That was theirs.

*Goo*?

*Oww!

Just owl.

Just owl.

Just owl.



*O.

They loved.
